violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling light covers in entry and food prep area noted in need of cleaning. Floor inside walkin freezer and walkin cooler need cleaning. Water on floor near ice machine needs cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Upper underside of fry-dump needs routine cleaning. Walkin cooler shelving needs cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Fry dump needs routine cleaning. Bottom-inside Silver King reachin in front service area needs cleaning.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Light cover in entryway needs cleaning. Ceiling vent and surrounding ceiling tiles in customer front service area needs cleaning. Ceiling and floor areas in kitchen area need cleaning. Heater unit over drive-thru window needs cleaning. Floor inside walkin cooler and walkin freezer need cleaning. Three-compartemnt sink needs recaulk to wall. Holes in walls in kitchen need repair.
